records.m_Talk_ENG: Current coordinates... unidentifiable//
records.m_Talk_DEU: Current coordinates... unidentifiable//
records.m_Talk_FRA: Current coordinates... unidentifiable//

records.m_Talk_ENG: No lifeforms detected within a 500 km radius//
records.m_Talk_DEU: No lifeforms detected within a 500 km radius//
records.m_Talk_FRA: No lifeforms detected within a 500 km radius//

records.m_Talk_ENG: No light detected_ Dark matter density extremely high_//
records.m_Talk_DEU: No light detected_ Dark matter density extremely high_//
records.m_Talk_FRA: No light detected_ Dark matter density extremely high_//

records.m_Talk_ENG: Estimated to be drifting through imaginary space//
records.m_Talk_DEU: Estimated to be drifting through imaginary space//
records.m_Talk_FRA: Estimated to be drifting through imaginary space//

records.m_Talk_ENG: Power insufficient... No escape method available//
records.m_Talk_DEU: Power insufficient... No escape method available//
records.m_Talk_FRA: Power insufficient... No escape method available//

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...Time remaining until system shutdown: 180 seconds.
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...Time remaining until system shutdown: 180 seconds.
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...Time remaining until system shutdown: 180 seconds.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Whew, it's really cold outside.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Whew, it's really cold outside.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Whew, it's really cold outside.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Were you looking for me, Boss?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Were you looking for me, Boss?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Were you looking for me, Boss?

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...Dash.
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...Dash.
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...Dash.

records.m_Talk_ENG: There isn't much time left, so I called you to talk for a bit.
records.m_Talk_DEU: There isn't much time left, so I called you to talk for a bit.
records.m_Talk_FRA: There isn't much time left, so I called you to talk for a bit.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Oh, then should I bring Rita over too?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Oh, then should I bring Rita over too?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Oh, then should I bring Rita over too?

records.m_Talk_ENG: That won't be necessary.
records.m_Talk_DEU: That won't be necessary.
records.m_Talk_FRA: That won't be necessary.

records.m_Talk_ENG: If I call her over for no reason, I feel like she'll just scold me for not doing better.
records.m_Talk_DEU: If I call her over for no reason, I feel like she'll just scold me for not doing better.
records.m_Talk_FRA: If I call her over for no reason, I feel like she'll just scold me for not doing better.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Oh, that's not true.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Oh, that's not true.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Oh, that's not true.

records.m_Talk_ENG: You did your best to protect humanity, Boss. I'm sure Rita would say you did well too.
records.m_Talk_DEU: You did your best to protect humanity, Boss. I'm sure Rita would say you did well too.
records.m_Talk_FRA: You did your best to protect humanity, Boss. I'm sure Rita would say you did well too.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I wasn't acting out of any grand mission like that.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I wasn't acting out of any grand mission like that.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I wasn't acting out of any grand mission like that.

records.m_Talk_ENG: The reason I tried to meet Thagirion... was to take revenge for the two of you.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The reason I tried to meet Thagirion... was to take revenge for the two of you.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The reason I tried to meet Thagirion... was to take revenge for the two of you.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Revenge? Because of us?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Revenge? Because of us?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Revenge? Because of us?

records.m_Talk_ENG: You know something? Things went south in the first place because those two rubbed that monster Thagirion the wrong way!
records.m_Talk_DEU: You know something? Things went south in the first place because those two rubbed that monster Thagirion the wrong way!
records.m_Talk_FRA: You know something? Things went south in the first place because those two rubbed that monster Thagirion the wrong way!

records.m_Talk_ENG: According to the Administration, Thagirion passed through countless worlds and gathered sisters who shared the same fate as itself.
records.m_Talk_DEU: According to the Administration, Thagirion passed through countless worlds and gathered sisters who shared the same fate as itself.
records.m_Talk_FRA: According to the Administration, Thagirion passed through countless worlds and gathered sisters who shared the same fate as itself.

records.m_Talk_ENG: If something like fate really exists, then that means it's someone who shares the same fate as you, Dash.
records.m_Talk_DEU: If something like fate really exists, then that means it's someone who shares the same fate as you, Dash.
records.m_Talk_FRA: If something like fate really exists, then that means it's someone who shares the same fate as you, Dash.

records.m_Talk_ENG: So after taking revenge... I wanted to ask.
records.m_Talk_DEU: So after taking revenge... I wanted to ask.
records.m_Talk_FRA: So after taking revenge... I wanted to ask.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Why it had to be that way.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Why it had to be that way.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Why it had to be that way.

records.m_Talk_ENG: What meaning there could possibly be... in taking away the peaceful everyday lives of its other selves in different worlds.
records.m_Talk_DEU: What meaning there could possibly be... in taking away the peaceful everyday lives of its other selves in different worlds.
records.m_Talk_FRA: What meaning there could possibly be... in taking away the peaceful everyday lives of its other selves in different worlds.

records.m_Talk_ENG: If Thagirion really is the same kind of being as me...
records.m_Talk_DEU: If Thagirion really is the same kind of being as me...
records.m_Talk_FRA: If Thagirion really is the same kind of being as me...

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...Then I think they must have suffered while doing those things too.
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...Then I think they must have suffered while doing those things too.
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...Then I think they must have suffered while doing those things too.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Trying to understand that monster even after what it did to you. You really are a naive human, Dash.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Trying to understand that monster even after what it did to you. You really are a naive human, Dash.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Trying to understand that monster even after what it did to you. You really are a naive human, Dash.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hehe.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hehe.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hehe.

records.m_Talk_ENG: In any case, we'll never know the truth.
records.m_Talk_DEU: In any case, we'll never know the truth.
records.m_Talk_FRA: In any case, we'll never know the truth.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Because the chance to ask that question is gone forever.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Because the chance to ask that question is gone forever.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Because the chance to ask that question is gone forever.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Dash...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Dash...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Dash...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Welcome aboard, Apostle Simurgh.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Welcome aboard, Apostle Simurgh.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Welcome aboard, Apostle Simurgh.

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...Where am I?
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...Where am I?
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...Where am I?

records.m_Talk_ENG: This ship is Ajdahaka. The first mothership created by the Regulator Asimov.
records.m_Talk_DEU: This ship is Ajdahaka. The first mothership created by the Regulator Asimov.
records.m_Talk_FRA: This ship is Ajdahaka. The first mothership created by the Regulator Asimov.

records.m_Talk_ENG: That answer is meaningless. Let me ask again.
records.m_Talk_DEU: That answer is meaningless. Let me ask again.
records.m_Talk_FRA: That answer is meaningless. Let me ask again.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Why am I here?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Why am I here?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Why am I here?

records.m_Talk_ENG: You arrived at this ship while drifting through imaginary space.
records.m_Talk_DEU: You arrived at this ship while drifting through imaginary space.
records.m_Talk_FRA: You arrived at this ship while drifting through imaginary space.

records.m_Talk_ENG: This ship detected your presence through its observation window and brought you inside through a recovery mechanism into an internal zone immune to Corruption.
records.m_Talk_DEU: This ship detected your presence through its observation window and brought you inside through a recovery mechanism into an internal zone immune to Corruption.
records.m_Talk_FRA: This ship detected your presence through its observation window and brought you inside through a recovery mechanism into an internal zone immune to Corruption.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Why does a fully intact ship like this exist in imaginary space?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Why does a fully intact ship like this exist in imaginary space?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Why does a fully intact ship like this exist in imaginary space?

records.m_Talk_ENG: To explain this ship, Ajdahaka is a model designed to enter imaginary space through a phase-fixation device and an entropy reversal module.
records.m_Talk_DEU: To explain this ship, Ajdahaka is a model designed to enter imaginary space through a phase-fixation device and an entropy reversal module.
records.m_Talk_FRA: To explain this ship, Ajdahaka is a model designed to enter imaginary space through a phase-fixation device and an entropy reversal module.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Although navigating imaginary space is technically impossible, this ship remained at fixed coordinates waiting for you.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Although navigating imaginary space is technically impossible, this ship remained at fixed coordinates waiting for you.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Although navigating imaginary space is technically impossible, this ship remained at fixed coordinates waiting for you.

records.m_Talk_ENG: That sounds as though you already knew I would come here.
records.m_Talk_DEU: That sounds as though you already knew I would come here.
records.m_Talk_FRA: That sounds as though you already knew I would come here.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Correct. Regulator Asimov predicted that you would arrive here through causal analysis.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Correct. Regulator Asimov predicted that you would arrive here through causal analysis.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Correct. Regulator Asimov predicted that you would arrive here through causal analysis.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Since when?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Since when?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Since when?

records.m_Talk_ENG: The design of Apostle Simurgh was adjusted so that humanity could acquire it, analyze it, and utilize its frame in various ways. As a result, it was equipped with the artificial intelligence personality module known as Horizon and used in humanity's Qliphoth Game, which ultimately led to your arrival here.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The design of Apostle Simurgh was adjusted so that humanity could acquire it, analyze it, and utilize its frame in various ways. As a result, it was equipped with the artificial intelligence personality module known as Horizon and used in humanity's Qliphoth Game, which ultimately led to your arrival here.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The design of Apostle Simurgh was adjusted so that humanity could acquire it, analyze it, and utilize its frame in various ways. As a result, it was equipped with the artificial intelligence personality module known as Horizon and used in humanity's Qliphoth Game, which ultimately led to your arrival here.

records.m_Talk_ENG: That means...
records.m_Talk_DEU: That means...
records.m_Talk_FRA: That means...

records.m_Talk_ENG: This moment had already been prepared even before I was created?
records.m_Talk_DEU: This moment had already been prepared even before I was created?
records.m_Talk_FRA: This moment had already been prepared even before I was created?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Correct. From the cosmological perspective of the humans that form the basis of your cognition... this could be called fate.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Correct. From the cosmological perspective of the humans that form the basis of your cognition... this could be called fate.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Correct. From the cosmological perspective of the humans that form the basis of your cognition... this could be called fate.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Fate...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Fate...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Fate...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Regulator Asimov sought to prove something. Whether mere instruments like us could also be given fate. And if that premise proved true, whether that fate could influence other fates as well.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Regulator Asimov sought to prove something. Whether mere instruments like us could also be given fate. And if that premise proved true, whether that fate could influence other fates as well.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Regulator Asimov sought to prove something. Whether mere instruments like us could also be given fate. And if that premise proved true, whether that fate could influence other fates as well.

records.m_Talk_ENG: You speak of fate in such grand terms, but simply put, you used me as an experimental subject.
records.m_Talk_DEU: You speak of fate in such grand terms, but simply put, you used me as an experimental subject.
records.m_Talk_FRA: You speak of fate in such grand terms, but simply put, you used me as an experimental subject.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Now that the experiment has proceeded as planned, are you going to dispose of me?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Now that the experiment has proceeded as planned, are you going to dispose of me?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Now that the experiment has proceeded as planned, are you going to dispose of me?

records.m_Talk_ENG: No. The experiment is not yet complete.
records.m_Talk_DEU: No. The experiment is not yet complete.
records.m_Talk_FRA: No. The experiment is not yet complete.

records.m_Talk_ENG: In 47 seconds, you will be transferred to another location.
records.m_Talk_DEU: In 47 seconds, you will be transferred to another location.
records.m_Talk_FRA: In 47 seconds, you will be transferred to another location.

records.m_Talk_ENG: There is currently a dimensional ship from another world drifting nearby that is still functioning normally.
records.m_Talk_DEU: There is currently a dimensional ship from another world drifting nearby that is still functioning normally.
records.m_Talk_FRA: There is currently a dimensional ship from another world drifting nearby that is still functioning normally.

records.m_Talk_ENG: By transmitting you to that dimensional ship through this ship's transfer port, you should be able to return to where you originally were. You will only have one chance.
records.m_Talk_DEU: By transmitting you to that dimensional ship through this ship's transfer port, you should be able to return to where you originally were. You will only have one chance.
records.m_Talk_FRA: By transmitting you to that dimensional ship through this ship's transfer port, you should be able to return to where you originally were. You will only have one chance.

records.m_Talk_ENG: There is something I want to ask.
records.m_Talk_DEU: There is something I want to ask.
records.m_Talk_FRA: There is something I want to ask.

records.m_Talk_ENG: 30 seconds.
records.m_Talk_DEU: 30 seconds.
records.m_Talk_FRA: 30 seconds.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Is it enough for me to stand here?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Is it enough for me to stand here?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Is it enough for me to stand here?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Thank you for your cooperation.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Thank you for your cooperation.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Thank you for your cooperation.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Time remaining until transfer... 16 seconds.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Time remaining until transfer... 16 seconds.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Time remaining until transfer... 16 seconds.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Does Asimov also know whose hands Thagirion will die by?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Does Asimov also know whose hands Thagirion will die by?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Does Asimov also know whose hands Thagirion will die by?

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...10 seconds.
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...10 seconds.
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...10 seconds.

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...7 seconds.
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...7 seconds.
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...7 seconds.

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...Record access successful. / 5 seconds.
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...Record access successful. / 5 seconds.
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...Record access successful. / 5 seconds.

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...Thagirion... / 3 seconds.
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...Thagirion... / 3 seconds.
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...Thagirion... / 3 seconds.

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...Will not be killed by anyone.
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...Will not be killed by anyone.
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...Will not be killed by anyone.

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...Are you all right? You look out of breath.
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...Are you all right? You look out of breath.
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...Are you all right? You look out of breath.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'm fine...
records.m_Talk_DEU: I'm fine...
records.m_Talk_FRA: I'm fine...

records.m_Talk_ENG: I just haven't practiced running enough lately.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I just haven't practiced running enough lately.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I just haven't practiced running enough lately.

records.m_Talk_ENG: We're almost there. Once we get out of this forest, you'll be able to see it.
records.m_Talk_DEU: We're almost there. Once we get out of this forest, you'll be able to see it.
records.m_Talk_FRA: We're almost there. Once we get out of this forest, you'll be able to see it.

records.m_Talk_ENG: This is...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: This is...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: This is...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Has Avalon's Gate been destroyed?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Has Avalon's Gate been destroyed?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Has Avalon's Gate been destroyed?

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...Clara?
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...Clara?
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...Clara?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Leah. Why are you trapped in a place like that?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Leah. Why are you trapped in a place like that?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Leah. Why are you trapped in a place like that?

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'll get you out right away!
records.m_Talk_DEU: I'll get you out right away!
records.m_Talk_FRA: I'll get you out right away!

records.m_Talk_ENG: That's... a prison made of swords?
records.m_Talk_DEU: That's... a prison made of swords?
records.m_Talk_FRA: That's... a prison made of swords?

records.m_Talk_ENG:
No! Clara! If you come here
8g!
records.m_Talk_DEU:
No! Clara! If you come here
8g!
records.m_Talk_FRA:
No! Clara! If you come here
8g!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Ah...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Ah...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Ah...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Got you.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Got you.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Got you.

records.m_Talk_ENG: All of you will have to remain here.
records.m_Talk_DEU: All of you will have to remain here.
records.m_Talk_FRA: All of you will have to remain here.

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...That includes you as well. Servant of Tammiel.
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...That includes you as well. Servant of Tammiel.
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...That includes you as well. Servant of Tammiel.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Why are you trying to keep them here?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Why are you trying to keep them here?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Why are you trying to keep them here?

records.m_Talk_ENG: We've waited a very long time for this moment, and we have no intention of letting those who would interfere with it go so easily.
records.m_Talk_DEU: We've waited a very long time for this moment, and we have no intention of letting those who would interfere with it go so easily.
records.m_Talk_FRA: We've waited a very long time for this moment, and we have no intention of letting those who would interfere with it go so easily.

records.m_Talk_ENG: What are you planning to do with Mina?
records.m_Talk_DEU: What are you planning to do with Mina?
records.m_Talk_FRA: What are you planning to do with Mina?

records.m_Talk_ENG: My sister will sever the Wolf's fate she carries.
records.m_Talk_DEU: My sister will sever the Wolf's fate she carries.
records.m_Talk_FRA: My sister will sever the Wolf's fate she carries.

records.m_Talk_ENG: What do you intend to gain by doing that?
records.m_Talk_DEU: What do you intend to gain by doing that?
records.m_Talk_FRA: What do you intend to gain by doing that?

records.m_Talk_ENG: A perfect paradise... where nothing ever changes will be completed.
records.m_Talk_DEU: A perfect paradise... where nothing ever changes will be completed.
records.m_Talk_FRA: A perfect paradise... where nothing ever changes will be completed.

records.m_Talk_ENG: If you truly believe a new world will not be created simply because the Wolf disappears... then I would say you are underestimating Tammiel.
records.m_Talk_DEU: If you truly believe a new world will not be created simply because the Wolf disappears... then I would say you are underestimating Tammiel.
records.m_Talk_FRA: If you truly believe a new world will not be created simply because the Wolf disappears... then I would say you are underestimating Tammiel.

records.m_Talk_ENG: A Demon Lord is like an essence that contains the possibilities of a world as a unit.
records.m_Talk_DEU: A Demon Lord is like an essence that contains the possibilities of a world as a unit.
records.m_Talk_FRA: A Demon Lord is like an essence that contains the possibilities of a world as a unit.

records.m_Talk_ENG: And the reason Tammiel creates worlds using the Tree of Sephiroth is to release the predator known as the Wolf to devour the Demon Lords and fully absorb the power of those worlds.
records.m_Talk_DEU: And the reason Tammiel creates worlds using the Tree of Sephiroth is to release the predator known as the Wolf to devour the Demon Lords and fully absorb the power of those worlds.
records.m_Talk_FRA: And the reason Tammiel creates worlds using the Tree of Sephiroth is to release the predator known as the Wolf to devour the Demon Lords and fully absorb the power of those worlds.

records.m_Talk_ENG: By passing through the ordeal that takes the form of the Qliphoth Game.
records.m_Talk_DEU: By passing through the ordeal that takes the form of the Qliphoth Game.
records.m_Talk_FRA: By passing through the ordeal that takes the form of the Qliphoth Game.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Am I wrong?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Am I wrong?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Am I wrong?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Then you must also know that the Wolf is her alter ego.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Then you must also know that the Wolf is her alter ego.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Then you must also know that the Wolf is her alter ego.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Of course. I also know that you are being thoroughly used as an Apostle by the Demon Lord Tammiel.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Of course. I also know that you are being thoroughly used as an Apostle by the Demon Lord Tammiel.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Of course. I also know that you are being thoroughly used as an Apostle by the Demon Lord Tammiel.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Someone like you would willingly play along with that woman's obvious tricks if it meant saving the world from destruction.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Someone like you would willingly play along with that woman's obvious tricks if it meant saving the world from destruction.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Someone like you would willingly play along with that woman's obvious tricks if it meant saving the world from destruction.

records.m_Talk_ENG: What are you talking about?
records.m_Talk_DEU: What are you talking about?
records.m_Talk_FRA: What are you talking about?

records.m_Talk_ENG: The Supreme Administrator... is an Apostle of a Demon Lord?
records.m_Talk_DEU: The Supreme Administrator... is an Apostle of a Demon Lord?
records.m_Talk_FRA: The Supreme Administrator... is an Apostle of a Demon Lord?

records.m_Talk_ENG: She's lying, right?
records.m_Talk_DEU: She's lying, right?
records.m_Talk_FRA: She's lying, right?

records.m_Talk_ENG: If that disappoints you, I apologize.
records.m_Talk_DEU: If that disappoints you, I apologize.
records.m_Talk_FRA: If that disappoints you, I apologize.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Of all times for this to happen... it's dangerous if we're trapped like this.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Of all times for this to happen... it's dangerous if we're trapped like this.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Of all times for this to happen... it's dangerous if we're trapped like this.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Ecclesia! Wake up!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Ecclesia! Wake up!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Ecclesia! Wake up!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Damn it, didn't regaining your memories fix your narcolepsy too?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Damn it, didn't regaining your memories fix your narcolepsy too?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Damn it, didn't regaining your memories fix your narcolepsy too?

records.m_Talk_ENG: What happened to the people who followed you? What about Chris?!
records.m_Talk_DEU: What happened to the people who followed you? What about Chris?!
records.m_Talk_FRA: What happened to the people who followed you? What about Chris?!

records.m_Talk_ENG: They are all currently coming here in pursuit of the Demon Lord Thagirion.
records.m_Talk_DEU: They are all currently coming here in pursuit of the Demon Lord Thagirion.
records.m_Talk_FRA: They are all currently coming here in pursuit of the Demon Lord Thagirion.

records.m_Talk_ENG: But they will never reach the summit. They will disappear before then.
records.m_Talk_DEU: But they will never reach the summit. They will disappear before then.
records.m_Talk_FRA: But they will never reach the summit. They will disappear before then.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Disappear...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Disappear...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Disappear...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Unlike the residents of the Promised Land, they are Exiles from distant worlds.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Unlike the residents of the Promised Land, they are Exiles from distant worlds.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Unlike the residents of the Promised Land, they are Exiles from distant worlds.

records.m_Talk_ENG: And the Golden Tree, as the Will of the World, exerts a kind of repulsive force that seeks to expel Exiles with different properties.
records.m_Talk_DEU: And the Golden Tree, as the Will of the World, exerts a kind of repulsive force that seeks to expel Exiles with different properties.
records.m_Talk_FRA: And the Golden Tree, as the Will of the World, exerts a kind of repulsive force that seeks to expel Exiles with different properties.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Don't be ridiculous.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Don't be ridiculous.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Don't be ridiculous.

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...Administrator!
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...Administrator!
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...Administrator!

records.m_Talk_ENG: If it's you, then there must be some way to get rid of that damned Golden Tree, right? You must have a plan if you came this far!
records.m_Talk_DEU: If it's you, then there must be some way to get rid of that damned Golden Tree, right? You must have a plan if you came this far!
records.m_Talk_FRA: If it's you, then there must be some way to get rid of that damned Golden Tree, right? You must have a plan if you came this far!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Unfortunately, there is no way to stop the Golden Tree.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Unfortunately, there is no way to stop the Golden Tree.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Unfortunately, there is no way to stop the Golden Tree.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Because the only means of defeating Thagirion, the Wolf, has disappeared.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Because the only means of defeating Thagirion, the Wolf, has disappeared.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Because the only means of defeating Thagirion, the Wolf, has disappeared.

records.m_Talk_ENG: What is that supposed to mean...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: What is that supposed to mean...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: What is that supposed to mean...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Are you saying you're giving up on everyone who followed you all the way here that easily?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Are you saying you're giving up on everyone who followed you all the way here that easily?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Are you saying you're giving up on everyone who followed you all the way here that easily?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Of course not.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Of course not.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Of course not.

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...Hmm?
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...Hmm?
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...Hmm?

records.m_Talk_ENG: What... was that sound?
records.m_Talk_DEU: What... was that sound?
records.m_Talk_FRA: What... was that sound?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Help me.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Help me.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Help me.

records.m_Talk_ENG: My friend.
records.m_Talk_DEU: My friend.
records.m_Talk_FRA: My friend.

records.m_Talk_ENG: That's... Clara's friend?
records.m_Talk_DEU: That's... Clara's friend?
records.m_Talk_FRA: That's... Clara's friend?

records.m_Talk_ENG: It never moved even once until now. What happened?
records.m_Talk_DEU: It never moved even once until now. What happened?
records.m_Talk_FRA: It never moved even once until now. What happened?

records.m_Talk_ENG:
Stop struggling and behave
8g
records.m_Talk_DEU:
Stop struggling and behave
8g
records.m_Talk_FRA:
Stop struggling and behave
8g

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...Kgh? The sword...
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...Kgh? The sword...
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...Kgh? The sword...

records.m_Talk_ENG: It sent Daina flying along with her sword?
records.m_Talk_DEU: It sent Daina flying along with her sword?
records.m_Talk_FRA: It sent Daina flying along with her sword?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Leah. Get down.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Leah. Get down.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Leah. Get down.

records.m_Talk_ENG: What?
records.m_Talk_DEU: What?
records.m_Talk_FRA: What?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Ngh...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Ngh...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Ngh...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: It melted the prison with a beam. Your friend's pretty intense.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It melted the prison with a beam. Your friend's pretty intense.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It melted the prison with a beam. Your friend's pretty intense.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Yeah. My friend is amazing.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Yeah. My friend is amazing.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Yeah. My friend is amazing.

records.m_Talk_ENG: And thank you for coming.
records.m_Talk_DEU: And thank you for coming.
records.m_Talk_FRA: And thank you for coming.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hmm? You're telling us to go first?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hmm? You're telling us to go first?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hmm? You're telling us to go first?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Why? Can't we go together?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Why? Can't we go together?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Why? Can't we go together?

records.m_Talk_ENG: You...
records.m_Talk_DEU: You...
records.m_Talk_FRA: You...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Aren't going anywhere...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Aren't going anywhere...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Aren't going anywhere...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: This is insane. She survived even after taking a direct hit from that massive tail?
records.m_Talk_DEU: This is insane. She survived even after taking a direct hit from that massive tail?
records.m_Talk_FRA: This is insane. She survived even after taking a direct hit from that massive tail?

records.m_Talk_ENG: My friend...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: My friend...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: My friend...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Quiet, you ice muncher.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Quiet, you ice muncher.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Quiet, you ice muncher.

records.m_Talk_ENG: If you trust your friend, then stop being stubborn and run.
records.m_Talk_DEU: If you trust your friend, then stop being stubborn and run.
records.m_Talk_FRA: If you trust your friend, then stop being stubborn and run.

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...Yeah.
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...Yeah.
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...Yeah.

records.m_Talk_ENG: How about leaving the rest to that friend of yours and getting out of here first?
records.m_Talk_DEU: How about leaving the rest to that friend of yours and getting out of here first?
records.m_Talk_FRA: How about leaving the rest to that friend of yours and getting out of here first?

records.m_Talk_ENG: I agree. Thanks to that damned Golden Tree, even if we kill her, she'll just come back anyway.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I agree. Thanks to that damned Golden Tree, even if we kill her, she'll just come back anyway.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I agree. Thanks to that damned Golden Tree, even if we kill her, she'll just come back anyway.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Let's go, Clara!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Let's go, Clara!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Let's go, Clara!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Current coordinates... unidentifiable//
root.m_Talk_DEU: Current coordinates... unidentifiable//
root.m_Talk_FRA: Current coordinates... unidentifiable//

root.m_Talk_ENG: No lifeforms detected within a 500 km radius//
root.m_Talk_DEU: No lifeforms detected within a 500 km radius//
root.m_Talk_FRA: No lifeforms detected within a 500 km radius//

root.m_Talk_ENG: No light detected_ Dark matter density extremely high_//
root.m_Talk_DEU: No light detected_ Dark matter density extremely high_//
root.m_Talk_FRA: No light detected_ Dark matter density extremely high_//

root.m_Talk_ENG: Estimated to be drifting through imaginary space//
root.m_Talk_DEU: Estimated to be drifting through imaginary space//
root.m_Talk_FRA: Estimated to be drifting through imaginary space//

root.m_Talk_ENG: Power insufficient... No escape method available//
root.m_Talk_DEU: Power insufficient... No escape method available//
root.m_Talk_FRA: Power insufficient... No escape method available//

root.m_Talk_ENG: ...Time remaining until system shutdown: 180 seconds.
root.m_Talk_DEU: ...Time remaining until system shutdown: 180 seconds.
root.m_Talk_FRA: ...Time remaining until system shutdown: 180 seconds.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Whew, it's really cold outside.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Whew, it's really cold outside.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Whew, it's really cold outside.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Were you looking for me, Boss?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Were you looking for me, Boss?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Were you looking for me, Boss?

root.m_Talk_ENG: ...Dash.
root.m_Talk_DEU: ...Dash.
root.m_Talk_FRA: ...Dash.

root.m_Talk_ENG: There isn't much time left, so I called you to talk for a bit.
root.m_Talk_DEU: There isn't much time left, so I called you to talk for a bit.
root.m_Talk_FRA: There isn't much time left, so I called you to talk for a bit.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Oh, then should I bring Rita over too?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Oh, then should I bring Rita over too?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Oh, then should I bring Rita over too?

root.m_Talk_ENG: That won't be necessary.
root.m_Talk_DEU: That won't be necessary.
root.m_Talk_FRA: That won't be necessary.

root.m_Talk_ENG: If I call her over for no reason, I feel like she'll just scold me for not doing better.
root.m_Talk_DEU: If I call her over for no reason, I feel like she'll just scold me for not doing better.
root.m_Talk_FRA: If I call her over for no reason, I feel like she'll just scold me for not doing better.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Oh, that's not true.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Oh, that's not true.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Oh, that's not true.

root.m_Talk_ENG: You did your best to protect humanity, Boss. I'm sure Rita would say you did well too.
root.m_Talk_DEU: You did your best to protect humanity, Boss. I'm sure Rita would say you did well too.
root.m_Talk_FRA: You did your best to protect humanity, Boss. I'm sure Rita would say you did well too.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I wasn't acting out of any grand mission like that.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I wasn't acting out of any grand mission like that.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I wasn't acting out of any grand mission like that.

root.m_Talk_ENG: The reason I tried to meet Thagirion... was to take revenge for the two of you.
root.m_Talk_DEU: The reason I tried to meet Thagirion... was to take revenge for the two of you.
root.m_Talk_FRA: The reason I tried to meet Thagirion... was to take revenge for the two of you.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Revenge? Because of us?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Revenge? Because of us?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Revenge? Because of us?

root.m_Talk_ENG: You know something? Things went south in the first place because those two rubbed that monster Thagirion the wrong way!
root.m_Talk_DEU: You know something? Things went south in the first place because those two rubbed that monster Thagirion the wrong way!
root.m_Talk_FRA: You know something? Things went south in the first place because those two rubbed that monster Thagirion the wrong way!

root.m_Talk_ENG: According to the Administration, Thagirion passed through countless worlds and gathered sisters who shared the same fate as itself.
root.m_Talk_DEU: According to the Administration, Thagirion passed through countless worlds and gathered sisters who shared the same fate as itself.
root.m_Talk_FRA: According to the Administration, Thagirion passed through countless worlds and gathered sisters who shared the same fate as itself.

root.m_Talk_ENG: If something like fate really exists, then that means it's someone who shares the same fate as you, Dash.
root.m_Talk_DEU: If something like fate really exists, then that means it's someone who shares the same fate as you, Dash.
root.m_Talk_FRA: If something like fate really exists, then that means it's someone who shares the same fate as you, Dash.

root.m_Talk_ENG: So after taking revenge... I wanted to ask.
root.m_Talk_DEU: So after taking revenge... I wanted to ask.
root.m_Talk_FRA: So after taking revenge... I wanted to ask.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Why it had to be that way.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Why it had to be that way.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Why it had to be that way.

root.m_Talk_ENG: What meaning there could possibly be... in taking away the peaceful everyday lives of its other selves in different worlds.
root.m_Talk_DEU: What meaning there could possibly be... in taking away the peaceful everyday lives of its other selves in different worlds.
root.m_Talk_FRA: What meaning there could possibly be... in taking away the peaceful everyday lives of its other selves in different worlds.

root.m_Talk_ENG: If Thagirion really is the same kind of being as me...
root.m_Talk_DEU: If Thagirion really is the same kind of being as me...
root.m_Talk_FRA: If Thagirion really is the same kind of being as me...

root.m_Talk_ENG: ...Then I think they must have suffered while doing those things too.
root.m_Talk_DEU: ...Then I think they must have suffered while doing those things too.
root.m_Talk_FRA: ...Then I think they must have suffered while doing those things too.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Trying to understand that monster even after what it did to you. You really are a naive human, Dash.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Trying to understand that monster even after what it did to you. You really are a naive human, Dash.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Trying to understand that monster even after what it did to you. You really are a naive human, Dash.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Hehe.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Hehe.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Hehe.

root.m_Talk_ENG: In any case, we'll never know the truth.
root.m_Talk_DEU: In any case, we'll never know the truth.
root.m_Talk_FRA: In any case, we'll never know the truth.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Because the chance to ask that question is gone forever.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Because the chance to ask that question is gone forever.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Because the chance to ask that question is gone forever.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Dash...?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Dash...?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Dash...?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Welcome aboard, Apostle Simurgh.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Welcome aboard, Apostle Simurgh.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Welcome aboard, Apostle Simurgh.

root.m_Talk_ENG: ...Where am I?
root.m_Talk_DEU: ...Where am I?
root.m_Talk_FRA: ...Where am I?

root.m_Talk_ENG: This ship is Ajdahaka. The first mothership created by the Regulator Asimov.
root.m_Talk_DEU: This ship is Ajdahaka. The first mothership created by the Regulator Asimov.
root.m_Talk_FRA: This ship is Ajdahaka. The first mothership created by the Regulator Asimov.

root.m_Talk_ENG: That answer is meaningless. Let me ask again.
root.m_Talk_DEU: That answer is meaningless. Let me ask again.
root.m_Talk_FRA: That answer is meaningless. Let me ask again.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Why am I here?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Why am I here?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Why am I here?

root.m_Talk_ENG: You arrived at this ship while drifting through imaginary space.
root.m_Talk_DEU: You arrived at this ship while drifting through imaginary space.
root.m_Talk_FRA: You arrived at this ship while drifting through imaginary space.

root.m_Talk_ENG: This ship detected your presence through its observation window and brought you inside through a recovery mechanism into an internal zone immune to Corruption.
root.m_Talk_DEU: This ship detected your presence through its observation window and brought you inside through a recovery mechanism into an internal zone immune to Corruption.
root.m_Talk_FRA: This ship detected your presence through its observation window and brought you inside through a recovery mechanism into an internal zone immune to Corruption.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Why does a fully intact ship like this exist in imaginary space?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Why does a fully intact ship like this exist in imaginary space?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Why does a fully intact ship like this exist in imaginary space?

root.m_Talk_ENG: To explain this ship, Ajdahaka is a model designed to enter imaginary space through a phase-fixation device and an entropy reversal module.
root.m_Talk_DEU: To explain this ship, Ajdahaka is a model designed to enter imaginary space through a phase-fixation device and an entropy reversal module.
root.m_Talk_FRA: To explain this ship, Ajdahaka is a model designed to enter imaginary space through a phase-fixation device and an entropy reversal module.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Although navigating imaginary space is technically impossible, this ship remained at fixed coordinates waiting for you.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Although navigating imaginary space is technically impossible, this ship remained at fixed coordinates waiting for you.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Although navigating imaginary space is technically impossible, this ship remained at fixed coordinates waiting for you.

root.m_Talk_ENG: That sounds as though you already knew I would come here.
root.m_Talk_DEU: That sounds as though you already knew I would come here.
root.m_Talk_FRA: That sounds as though you already knew I would come here.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Correct. Regulator Asimov predicted that you would arrive here through causal analysis.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Correct. Regulator Asimov predicted that you would arrive here through causal analysis.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Correct. Regulator Asimov predicted that you would arrive here through causal analysis.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Since when?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Since when?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Since when?

root.m_Talk_ENG: The design of Apostle Simurgh was adjusted so that humanity could acquire it, analyze it, and utilize its frame in various ways. As a result, it was equipped with the artificial intelligence personality module known as Horizon and used in humanity's Qliphoth Game, which ultimately led to your arrival here.
root.m_Talk_DEU: The design of Apostle Simurgh was adjusted so that humanity could acquire it, analyze it, and utilize its frame in various ways. As a result, it was equipped with the artificial intelligence personality module known as Horizon and used in humanity's Qliphoth Game, which ultimately led to your arrival here.
root.m_Talk_FRA: The design of Apostle Simurgh was adjusted so that humanity could acquire it, analyze it, and utilize its frame in various ways. As a result, it was equipped with the artificial intelligence personality module known as Horizon and used in humanity's Qliphoth Game, which ultimately led to your arrival here.

root.m_Talk_ENG: That means...
root.m_Talk_DEU: That means...
root.m_Talk_FRA: That means...

root.m_Talk_ENG: This moment had already been prepared even before I was created?
root.m_Talk_DEU: This moment had already been prepared even before I was created?
root.m_Talk_FRA: This moment had already been prepared even before I was created?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Correct. From the cosmological perspective of the humans that form the basis of your cognition... this could be called fate.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Correct. From the cosmological perspective of the humans that form the basis of your cognition... this could be called fate.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Correct. From the cosmological perspective of the humans that form the basis of your cognition... this could be called fate.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Fate...?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Fate...?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Fate...?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Regulator Asimov sought to prove something. Whether mere instruments like us could also be given fate. And if that premise proved true, whether that fate could influence other fates as well.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Regulator Asimov sought to prove something. Whether mere instruments like us could also be given fate. And if that premise proved true, whether that fate could influence other fates as well.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Regulator Asimov sought to prove something. Whether mere instruments like us could also be given fate. And if that premise proved true, whether that fate could influence other fates as well.

root.m_Talk_ENG: You speak of fate in such grand terms, but simply put, you used me as an experimental subject.
root.m_Talk_DEU: You speak of fate in such grand terms, but simply put, you used me as an experimental subject.
root.m_Talk_FRA: You speak of fate in such grand terms, but simply put, you used me as an experimental subject.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Now that the experiment has proceeded as planned, are you going to dispose of me?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Now that the experiment has proceeded as planned, are you going to dispose of me?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Now that the experiment has proceeded as planned, are you going to dispose of me?

root.m_Talk_ENG: No. The experiment is not yet complete.
root.m_Talk_DEU: No. The experiment is not yet complete.
root.m_Talk_FRA: No. The experiment is not yet complete.

root.m_Talk_ENG: In 47 seconds, you will be transferred to another location.
root.m_Talk_DEU: In 47 seconds, you will be transferred to another location.
root.m_Talk_FRA: In 47 seconds, you will be transferred to another location.

root.m_Talk_ENG: There is currently a dimensional ship from another world drifting nearby that is still functioning normally.
root.m_Talk_DEU: There is currently a dimensional ship from another world drifting nearby that is still functioning normally.
root.m_Talk_FRA: There is currently a dimensional ship from another world drifting nearby that is still functioning normally.

root.m_Talk_ENG: By transmitting you to that dimensional ship through this ship's transfer port, you should be able to return to where you originally were. You will only have one chance.
root.m_Talk_DEU: By transmitting you to that dimensional ship through this ship's transfer port, you should be able to return to where you originally were. You will only have one chance.
root.m_Talk_FRA: By transmitting you to that dimensional ship through this ship's transfer port, you should be able to return to where you originally were. You will only have one chance.

root.m_Talk_ENG: There is something I want to ask.
root.m_Talk_DEU: There is something I want to ask.
root.m_Talk_FRA: There is something I want to ask.

root.m_Talk_ENG: 30 seconds.
root.m_Talk_DEU: 30 seconds.
root.m_Talk_FRA: 30 seconds.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Is it enough for me to stand here?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Is it enough for me to stand here?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Is it enough for me to stand here?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Thank you for your cooperation.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Thank you for your cooperation.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Thank you for your cooperation.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Time remaining until transfer... 16 seconds.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Time remaining until transfer... 16 seconds.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Time remaining until transfer... 16 seconds.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Does Asimov also know whose hands Thagirion will die by?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Does Asimov also know whose hands Thagirion will die by?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Does Asimov also know whose hands Thagirion will die by?

root.m_Talk_ENG: ...10 seconds.
root.m_Talk_DEU: ...10 seconds.
root.m_Talk_FRA: ...10 seconds.

root.m_Talk_ENG: ...7 seconds.
root.m_Talk_DEU: ...7 seconds.
root.m_Talk_FRA: ...7 seconds.

root.m_Talk_ENG: ...Record access successful. / 5 seconds.
root.m_Talk_DEU: ...Record access successful. / 5 seconds.
root.m_Talk_FRA: ...Record access successful. / 5 seconds.

root.m_Talk_ENG: ...Thagirion... / 3 seconds.
root.m_Talk_DEU: ...Thagirion... / 3 seconds.
root.m_Talk_FRA: ...Thagirion... / 3 seconds.

root.m_Talk_ENG: ...Will not be killed by anyone.
root.m_Talk_DEU: ...Will not be killed by anyone.
root.m_Talk_FRA: ...Will not be killed by anyone.

root.m_Talk_ENG: ...Are you all right? You look out of breath.
root.m_Talk_DEU: ...Are you all right? You look out of breath.
root.m_Talk_FRA: ...Are you all right? You look out of breath.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I'm fine...
root.m_Talk_DEU: I'm fine...
root.m_Talk_FRA: I'm fine...

root.m_Talk_ENG: I just haven't practiced running enough lately.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I just haven't practiced running enough lately.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I just haven't practiced running enough lately.

root.m_Talk_ENG: We're almost there. Once we get out of this forest, you'll be able to see it.
root.m_Talk_DEU: We're almost there. Once we get out of this forest, you'll be able to see it.
root.m_Talk_FRA: We're almost there. Once we get out of this forest, you'll be able to see it.

root.m_Talk_ENG: This is...?
root.m_Talk_DEU: This is...?
root.m_Talk_FRA: This is...?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Has Avalon's Gate been destroyed?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Has Avalon's Gate been destroyed?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Has Avalon's Gate been destroyed?

root.m_Talk_ENG: ...Clara?
root.m_Talk_DEU: ...Clara?
root.m_Talk_FRA: ...Clara?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Leah. Why are you trapped in a place like that?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Leah. Why are you trapped in a place like that?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Leah. Why are you trapped in a place like that?

root.m_Talk_ENG: I'll get you out right away!
root.m_Talk_DEU: I'll get you out right away!
root.m_Talk_FRA: I'll get you out right away!

root.m_Talk_ENG: That's... a prison made of swords?
root.m_Talk_DEU: That's... a prison made of swords?
root.m_Talk_FRA: That's... a prison made of swords?

root.m_Talk_ENG:
No! Clara! If you come here
8g!
root.m_Talk_DEU:
No! Clara! If you come here
8g!
root.m_Talk_FRA:
No! Clara! If you come here
8g!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Ah...
root.m_Talk_DEU: Ah...
root.m_Talk_FRA: Ah...

root.m_Talk_ENG: Got you.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Got you.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Got you.

root.m_Talk_ENG: All of you will have to remain here.
root.m_Talk_DEU: All of you will have to remain here.
root.m_Talk_FRA: All of you will have to remain here.

root.m_Talk_ENG: ...That includes you as well. Servant of Tammiel.
root.m_Talk_DEU: ...That includes you as well. Servant of Tammiel.
root.m_Talk_FRA: ...That includes you as well. Servant of Tammiel.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Why are you trying to keep them here?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Why are you trying to keep them here?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Why are you trying to keep them here?

root.m_Talk_ENG: We've waited a very long time for this moment, and we have no intention of letting those who would interfere with it go so easily.
root.m_Talk_DEU: We've waited a very long time for this moment, and we have no intention of letting those who would interfere with it go so easily.
root.m_Talk_FRA: We've waited a very long time for this moment, and we have no intention of letting those who would interfere with it go so easily.

root.m_Talk_ENG: What are you planning to do with Mina?
root.m_Talk_DEU: What are you planning to do with Mina?
root.m_Talk_FRA: What are you planning to do with Mina?

root.m_Talk_ENG: My sister will sever the Wolf's fate she carries.
root.m_Talk_DEU: My sister will sever the Wolf's fate she carries.
root.m_Talk_FRA: My sister will sever the Wolf's fate she carries.

root.m_Talk_ENG: What do you intend to gain by doing that?
root.m_Talk_DEU: What do you intend to gain by doing that?
root.m_Talk_FRA: What do you intend to gain by doing that?

root.m_Talk_ENG: A perfect paradise... where nothing ever changes will be completed.
root.m_Talk_DEU: A perfect paradise... where nothing ever changes will be completed.
root.m_Talk_FRA: A perfect paradise... where nothing ever changes will be completed.

root.m_Talk_ENG: If you truly believe a new world will not be created simply because the Wolf disappears... then I would say you are underestimating Tammiel.
root.m_Talk_DEU: If you truly believe a new world will not be created simply because the Wolf disappears... then I would say you are underestimating Tammiel.
root.m_Talk_FRA: If you truly believe a new world will not be created simply because the Wolf disappears... then I would say you are underestimating Tammiel.

root.m_Talk_ENG: A Demon Lord is like an essence that contains the possibilities of a world as a unit.
root.m_Talk_DEU: A Demon Lord is like an essence that contains the possibilities of a world as a unit.
root.m_Talk_FRA: A Demon Lord is like an essence that contains the possibilities of a world as a unit.

root.m_Talk_ENG: And the reason Tammiel creates worlds using the Tree of Sephiroth is to release the predator known as the Wolf to devour the Demon Lords and fully absorb the power of those worlds.
root.m_Talk_DEU: And the reason Tammiel creates worlds using the Tree of Sephiroth is to release the predator known as the Wolf to devour the Demon Lords and fully absorb the power of those worlds.
root.m_Talk_FRA: And the reason Tammiel creates worlds using the Tree of Sephiroth is to release the predator known as the Wolf to devour the Demon Lords and fully absorb the power of those worlds.

root.m_Talk_ENG: By passing through the ordeal that takes the form of the Qliphoth Game.
root.m_Talk_DEU: By passing through the ordeal that takes the form of the Qliphoth Game.
root.m_Talk_FRA: By passing through the ordeal that takes the form of the Qliphoth Game.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Am I wrong?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Am I wrong?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Am I wrong?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Then you must also know that the Wolf is her alter ego.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Then you must also know that the Wolf is her alter ego.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Then you must also know that the Wolf is her alter ego.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Of course. I also know that you are being thoroughly used as an Apostle by the Demon Lord Tammiel.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Of course. I also know that you are being thoroughly used as an Apostle by the Demon Lord Tammiel.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Of course. I also know that you are being thoroughly used as an Apostle by the Demon Lord Tammiel.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Someone like you would willingly play along with that woman's obvious tricks if it meant saving the world from destruction.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Someone like you would willingly play along with that woman's obvious tricks if it meant saving the world from destruction.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Someone like you would willingly play along with that woman's obvious tricks if it meant saving the world from destruction.

root.m_Talk_ENG: What are you talking about?
root.m_Talk_DEU: What are you talking about?
root.m_Talk_FRA: What are you talking about?

root.m_Talk_ENG: The Supreme Administrator... is an Apostle of a Demon Lord?
root.m_Talk_DEU: The Supreme Administrator... is an Apostle of a Demon Lord?
root.m_Talk_FRA: The Supreme Administrator... is an Apostle of a Demon Lord?

root.m_Talk_ENG: She's lying, right?
root.m_Talk_DEU: She's lying, right?
root.m_Talk_FRA: She's lying, right?

root.m_Talk_ENG: If that disappoints you, I apologize.
root.m_Talk_DEU: If that disappoints you, I apologize.
root.m_Talk_FRA: If that disappoints you, I apologize.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Of all times for this to happen... it's dangerous if we're trapped like this.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Of all times for this to happen... it's dangerous if we're trapped like this.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Of all times for this to happen... it's dangerous if we're trapped like this.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Ecclesia! Wake up!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Ecclesia! Wake up!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Ecclesia! Wake up!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Damn it, didn't regaining your memories fix your narcolepsy too?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Damn it, didn't regaining your memories fix your narcolepsy too?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Damn it, didn't regaining your memories fix your narcolepsy too?

root.m_Talk_ENG: What happened to the people who followed you? What about Chris?!
root.m_Talk_DEU: What happened to the people who followed you? What about Chris?!
root.m_Talk_FRA: What happened to the people who followed you? What about Chris?!

root.m_Talk_ENG: They are all currently coming here in pursuit of the Demon Lord Thagirion.
root.m_Talk_DEU: They are all currently coming here in pursuit of the Demon Lord Thagirion.
root.m_Talk_FRA: They are all currently coming here in pursuit of the Demon Lord Thagirion.

root.m_Talk_ENG: But they will never reach the summit. They will disappear before then.
root.m_Talk_DEU: But they will never reach the summit. They will disappear before then.
root.m_Talk_FRA: But they will never reach the summit. They will disappear before then.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Disappear...?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Disappear...?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Disappear...?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Unlike the residents of the Promised Land, they are Exiles from distant worlds.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Unlike the residents of the Promised Land, they are Exiles from distant worlds.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Unlike the residents of the Promised Land, they are Exiles from distant worlds.

root.m_Talk_ENG: And the Golden Tree, as the Will of the World, exerts a kind of repulsive force that seeks to expel Exiles with different properties.
root.m_Talk_DEU: And the Golden Tree, as the Will of the World, exerts a kind of repulsive force that seeks to expel Exiles with different properties.
root.m_Talk_FRA: And the Golden Tree, as the Will of the World, exerts a kind of repulsive force that seeks to expel Exiles with different properties.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Don't be ridiculous.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Don't be ridiculous.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Don't be ridiculous.

root.m_Talk_ENG: ...Administrator!
root.m_Talk_DEU: ...Administrator!
root.m_Talk_FRA: ...Administrator!

root.m_Talk_ENG: If it's you, then there must be some way to get rid of that damned Golden Tree, right? You must have a plan if you came this far!
root.m_Talk_DEU: If it's you, then there must be some way to get rid of that damned Golden Tree, right? You must have a plan if you came this far!
root.m_Talk_FRA: If it's you, then there must be some way to get rid of that damned Golden Tree, right? You must have a plan if you came this far!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Unfortunately, there is no way to stop the Golden Tree.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Unfortunately, there is no way to stop the Golden Tree.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Unfortunately, there is no way to stop the Golden Tree.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Because the only means of defeating Thagirion, the Wolf, has disappeared.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Because the only means of defeating Thagirion, the Wolf, has disappeared.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Because the only means of defeating Thagirion, the Wolf, has disappeared.

root.m_Talk_ENG: What is that supposed to mean...?
root.m_Talk_DEU: What is that supposed to mean...?
root.m_Talk_FRA: What is that supposed to mean...?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Are you saying you're giving up on everyone who followed you all the way here that easily?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Are you saying you're giving up on everyone who followed you all the way here that easily?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Are you saying you're giving up on everyone who followed you all the way here that easily?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Of course not.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Of course not.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Of course not.

root.m_Talk_ENG: ...Hmm?
root.m_Talk_DEU: ...Hmm?
root.m_Talk_FRA: ...Hmm?

root.m_Talk_ENG: What... was that sound?
root.m_Talk_DEU: What... was that sound?
root.m_Talk_FRA: What... was that sound?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Help me.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Help me.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Help me.

root.m_Talk_ENG: My friend.
root.m_Talk_DEU: My friend.
root.m_Talk_FRA: My friend.

root.m_Talk_ENG: That's... Clara's friend?
root.m_Talk_DEU: That's... Clara's friend?
root.m_Talk_FRA: That's... Clara's friend?

root.m_Talk_ENG: It never moved even once until now. What happened?
root.m_Talk_DEU: It never moved even once until now. What happened?
root.m_Talk_FRA: It never moved even once until now. What happened?

root.m_Talk_ENG:
Stop struggling and behave
8g

Stop struggling and behave
8g
root.m_Talk_FRA:
Stop struggling and behave

root.m_Talk_ENG: ...Kgh? The sword...
root.m_Talk_DEU: ...Kgh? The sword...
root.m_Talk_FRA: ...Kgh? The sword...

root.m_Talk_ENG: It sent Daina flying along with her sword?
root.m_Talk_DEU: It sent Daina flying along with her sword?
root.m_Talk_FRA: It sent Daina flying along with her sword?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Leah. Get down.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Leah. Get down.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Leah. Get down.

root.m_Talk_ENG: What?
root.m_Talk_DEU: What?
root.m_Talk_FRA: What?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Ngh...!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Ngh...!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Ngh...!

root.m_Talk_ENG: It melted the prison with a beam. Your friend's pretty intense.
root.m_Talk_DEU: It melted the prison with a beam. Your friend's pretty intense.
root.m_Talk_FRA: It melted the prison with a beam. Your friend's pretty intense.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Yeah. My friend is amazing.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Yeah. My friend is amazing.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Yeah. My friend is amazing.

root.m_Talk_ENG: And thank you for coming.
root.m_Talk_DEU: And thank you for coming.
root.m_Talk_FRA: And thank you for coming.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Hmm? You're telling us to go first?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Hmm? You're telling us to go first?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Hmm? You're telling us to go first?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Why? Can't we go together?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Why? Can't we go together?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Why? Can't we go together?

root.m_Talk_ENG: You...
root.m_Talk_DEU: You...
root.m_Talk_FRA: You...

root.m_Talk_ENG: Aren't going anywhere...!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Aren't going anywhere...!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Aren't going anywhere...!

root.m_Talk_ENG: This is insane. She survived even after taking a direct hit from that massive tail?
root.m_Talk_DEU: This is insane. She survived even after taking a direct hit from that massive tail?
root.m_Talk_FRA: This is insane. She survived even after taking a direct hit from that massive tail?

root.m_Talk_ENG: My friend...!
root.m_Talk_DEU: My friend...!
root.m_Talk_FRA: My friend...!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Quiet, you ice muncher.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Quiet, you ice muncher.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Quiet, you ice muncher.

root.m_Talk_ENG: If you trust your friend, then stop being stubborn and run.
root.m_Talk_DEU: If you trust your friend, then stop being stubborn and run.
root.m_Talk_FRA: If you trust your friend, then stop being stubborn and run.

root.m_Talk_ENG: ...Yeah.
root.m_Talk_DEU: ...Yeah.
root.m_Talk_FRA: ...Yeah.

root.m_Talk_ENG: How about leaving the rest to that friend of yours and getting out of here first?
root.m_Talk_DEU: How about leaving the rest to that friend of yours and getting out of here first?
root.m_Talk_FRA: How about leaving the rest to that friend of yours and getting out of here first?

root.m_Talk_ENG: I agree. Thanks to that damned Golden Tree, even if we kill her, she'll just come back anyway.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I agree. Thanks to that damned Golden Tree, even if we kill her, she'll just come back anyway.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I agree. Thanks to that damned Golden Tree, even if we kill her, she'll just come back anyway.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Let's go, Clara!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Let's go, Clara!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Let's go, Clara!
